title: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts - Navigation
scenario: Navigate to Notifications & Device Alerts under App Settings > General and verify UI matches Figma design
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap the hamburger menu icon (☰) in the upper left corner to open App Settings.
5. Tap the back button (←) to return to the App Settings page.
expected: Step 4: The Notifications & Device Alerts screen matches the Figma design. Step 5: The user returns to the App Settings (General) page.
